title: How to Build a Business Using AI: From Idea to Launch in One Day
summary: Rocket 1.0 is a workflow platform designed to address context loss between AI tools like Perplexity, Claude, and Cursor. The video demonstrates building a startup MVP using Rocket's Track, Build, and Solve components, comparing its capabilities to Claude Code while evaluating how well it maintains context continuity across tools.
writeup: The video introduces Rocket 1.0, a workflow platform built to reduce context loss when work moves between AI tools such as Perplexity, Claude, and Cursor. It walks through building a startup MVP using Rocket's three components: Track, Build, and Solve. The demonstration compares Rocket's capabilities against Claude Code and assesses how well context continuity holds across the different tools in the chain.
